mapper.select:
select
from sys_movie
and `name` like CONCAT('%',#{vo.name},'%')
and cid = #{vo.cid}
and is_deleted = 0
order by id desc
SELECT DATE (create_time) AS day, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_movie WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE() , INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE (create_time);

SELECT m.id, m.name AS title, m.director AS author, s.play_count AS views, m.image AS coverUrl, m.cid AS category FROM sys_movie m LEFT JOIN video_stat s ON m.id = s.video_id WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.is_approval = '1' ORDER BY s.like_count DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT m.id, m.name AS title, m.director AS author, s.visit_pv AS views, m.image AS coverUrl, m.cid AS category FROM sys_movie m LEFT JOIN video_stat s ON m.id = s.video_id WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.is_approval = '1' ORDER BY s.visit_pv DESC LIMIT 10
